data.current_description: Convert Foursquare venue IDs to Untappd venue IDs
data.summary_suggestion: Convert Foursquare venue ID to Untappd venue ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the corresponding Untappd venue ID for a given Foursquare venue ID. This operation enables integration with Foursquare location data by mapping external venue identifiers to Untappd's internal venue system. Accepts a Foursquare venue ID as input and returns the matched Untappd venue ID along with associated venue details. Returns null or an error if no matching venue is found in Untappd's database.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic and doesn't clearly indicate the directional mapping (Foursquare to Untappd). Description lacks context about the integration purpose, expected input format, return value structure, and error handling. Enhanced version clarifies the mapping direction, explains the use case for AI agents, specifies input/output details, and documents failure scenarios for better AI agent decision-making.

Operation 'foursquareLookup' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_input_details. Enhanced version clarifies the mapping direction, explains the use case for AI agents, specifies input/output details, and documents failure scenarios for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Convert Foursquare venue IDs to Untappd venue IDs
data.summary_suggestion: Convert Foursquare venue ID to Untappd venue ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the corresponding Untappd venue ID for a given Foursquare venue ID. This operation enables integration with Foursquare location data by mapping external venue identifiers to Untappd's internal venue system. Accepts a Foursquare venue ID as input and returns the matched Untappd venue ID along with associated venue details. Returns null or an error if no matching venue is found in Untappd's database.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic and doesn't clearly indicate the directional mapping (Foursquare to Untappd). Description lacks context about the integration purpose, expected input format, return value structure, and error handling. Enhanced version clarifies the mapping direction, explains the use case for AI agents, specifies input/output details, and documents failure scenarios for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Send a friend request to another user
data.description_suggestion: Sends a friend request to the specified user. Requires authentication. The target user will receive a pending friend request notification. Returns confirmation of the request being sent. The request will remain pending until the target user accepts or rejects it.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on authentication requirements, what the target user receives, return value, and the resulting state change. Added these details to help AI agents understand the operation's full context and effects.

data.current_description: Accept a pending friend request
data.description_suggestion: Accepts a pending friend request from the specified user. Requires authentication. Establishes a bidirectional friendship connection between the authenticated user and the target user. Returns confirmation of the friendship being established. Both users will now appear in each other's friends list.
data.reasoning: Description is incomplete regarding authentication, what happens as a result, return value, and the bidirectional nature of the friendship. Enhanced to clarify the operation's full scope and state changes.
